name: Moussaka
description: Greek layered casserole of spiced minced lamb, sliced aubergine, and thick béchamel — rich and deeply satisfying.

recipeInstructions.title: Aubergine
recipeInstructions.text: Brush aubergine slices with olive oil, season, and grill or roast at 200°C for 20 minutes until golden and tender.

recipeInstructions.title: Meat sauce
recipeInstructions.text: Fry onion and garlic until soft. Add lamb and brown well. Add wine, tomatoes, purée, cinnamon, and allspice. Simmer 20 minutes until thick. Season.

recipeInstructions.title: Béchamel
recipeInstructions.text: Melt butter, whisk in flour, and cook 1 minute. Gradually add milk, whisking until thick. Off heat, beat in egg yolks, nutmeg, and half the cheese.

recipeInstructions.title: Assembly
recipeInstructions.text: Preheat oven to 180°C. Layer half the aubergine in a large baking dish, add all the meat sauce, then remaining aubergine. Pour béchamel over the top and scatter with remaining cheese.
Bake for 45 minutes until golden and bubbling. Rest 15 minutes before serving.

notes.title: Make ahead
notes.text: Moussaka reheats beautifully and is often better the next day.
